/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_malloc_internal.so.2407.0.0 -o libabsl_malloc_internal.so.2407.0.0 CMakeFiles/malloc_internal.dir/internal/low_level_alloc.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN:" libabsl_base.so.2407.0.0 libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2407.0.0 -lpthread libabsl_log_severity.so.2407.0.0 libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2407.0.0
